title: Meet the farmer
lines: As you approach the desolate Old Crow Farm, you spot a solitary figure standing before the massive, weathered barn doors, which are scorched with faint, geometric patterns that seem to move if you look at them too long.

The farmer stands with a preternatural stiffness, clutching a rusted pitchfork. His eyes—milky and cataracts-ridden—are fixed on some point in the bruising-purple firmament that you cannot see, but can certainly feel.

His skin has the sickly texture of wet parchment, and he vibrates with a low-frequency hum. From within the deep, stygian shadows of the barn, you hear a strange, rhythmic ticking—a countdown in a language of pure, cold mathematics.

options.desc: 1. Back away from the vibrating farmer
1. Claim the abandoned cattle prod leaning against the fence
2. Attempt to speak with the catatonic figure
3. Flee back toward the hill before you catch the madness
